TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == sakatalawan nu mapuyapuyay a imelang Ś¶äŚ®†śĮíŤ°ÄÁóá == sakatalawan nu mapuyapuyan a mabulilah nu imelang, sningaanganaca tu cin-caw-ce-cin, nu cwawaw,yu sumamad pangangan han tu sakatalawan nu mapuypuyay a imelang, u nikapuyapuyan henay a nikaidawan nu imelang, u wayway nida han u talakaw nu idang atu salengacay nu ti'ku a isi'. mahiniaay a imelang hina i sakatulu nu buladan a mapuyapuy " sakapitu katukuh i sakasiwa a bulad", pihaceng tu i kapilecuhan, anupihaceng kina imelang alaw a tahekal ku zun-sia a kawaw, sea-saw-pan tadaadidi'tu, atay atu buwa' alaw a maduka malebawa, cumuda nu nanum ku bala' atu mila'cus tu mata. mahiniaay a imelang patalakaw tu malawinaay a nikudan nu sakabalihenawan. anu caay pikalamkam a tayda i padekuwan paising, alaw a mabulilah, u ce-cen. malebawa " micidek ku bihid atu lima" u sakatinengan nu misaydan tu misabiliay a waywayan, nika u mapuyapuyan hina lebawaw a waywayan. sisa utiih a adihan, saan, lebawa " micidekay nu lebawawan, hina adih kita tu bihid,lima, kuku', penec han idaw ku nalimaan" kiya idaw ku niadihan tu misaydan a imian,anu simahiniaay a imelang kanca a musakamu tu misaydan. 59 173 nu mahiniay a misabiliay inai' ku picidekan nu talakaw a waywayan, kanahatu mapuyapuyay henay tahekal kina hachac nu imelang caay kahida u misabiliay a imelangan. adada ku i pabaway nu bilian a imelang palaadadaan nu bituka sa. sisa, paising kanca a tahekal ku yadahay nu misabiliay nu cancanan a waywayan, namulecuh satu mahiniay a waywayan a malawpestu taneng kita palutatengan tu mahiniaay a imelangan. mahiniay nu ce-kun a imelangan, inai' henay ku wantan tina imelangan, wida sa katinengan atu yadah nu waywayan, pasumahiniay a kawaw, caay ka kapah ku pisabilian nu lutungay i labu. 30 267 ŤÉéŚļßÁēįŚłł. men-yi-sea a kawawŚÖćÁĖęŚ≠łŚõ†Áī† mapuyapuy tu aayaw nu imelan atu ayda a siimelang, anu nasitalakaw nu idangan, kidemu, kan-lin-ce imelangan, hatu nasikamilmilan nu misabili henay, sakatalawan ku mahiniay. 24 291 ,micidek ku sakabalihenawan ťĘ®ťö™ŤľÉťęė sipakayda i kan, patinaku anu caay ka taneng ku nika tu kay-ce a micunus mukan tu kay-ce, kya mawada tasasa ku ce-cin-cen-cen a katalawan. . sipakayda i liklik, u mauning ku hekal. . nu matenesay tu nasitalakaway nu idang a mapuyapuy, ce-cin-cen-cen a lemed caay pikake tu talakaw nu idangan a pitu walu a bayan. itini nikaudipan a nikinkiwan, maadih ku ce-cin-cen-cen atu nikasumadan nika udipan idaw ku kanki: nu kalawinaan atu nabinadu'an idaw ku men-yi-ing-ta atu nikalalibedan a nikasasumadan, maduka ku binaduan, atu ilabuay nu banges a si-paw maduka, masumad ku culil nu hikan, yen-hua-ing-li, culil nu idang caay ka lecad, ilabuay nu hikan a idang mawada', atu mabulasakay a idang i hikan masud nu idang. anu mapuyapuy idaw ku mahiniaay a imelang, anuidaw ku ce-cin-cin-cen: na kapah henay ku idang, nika mapuyapuy tu tusa a bataan a pilipayan, silaad tu sepat katukuh tu enem a tatukian kinatusa miditek tu idang, anu tahekal ku suo-su-ya ‚Č•140 mmHg, atu su-cen-ya ‚Č•90 mmHg a idangan. anu nikapuyapuyan tu tusa a aayaw nu pilipayan na idaw t uku talakaw nu idng, u sakalucek nu niadihan: u suo-su-ya (SBP) talakaw a milakuuyd tu 30 mmHg, atu su-cen-ya (DBP) talakaw milakuuyd tu 15mmHg. itini i tusip nu tukian a isi'an, salengac nu ti'ku a isi' ‚Č• 0.3 ke' "300 haw ke'" hatu SPOT salengac nu ti'ku a isi' atu ci-kan niditekan ‚Č•0.3, atu niasipan tu tatipelukan u 1+ hatu mikitalakaw. anu mapuyapuy henay talakaw ku idang, kanahatu inai' ku salengac nu ti'ku a isi', apabaliw kita tu nikaidawan nu ce-cen-cin-cen, amatulin ku nipimilaw. idaw ku caysep % nu ce-cen-cin-cen a tademaw idaw ku duma a imelangan nu waywayan, idaw ku tusep % nu ce-cen-cin-cen a tademaw inai' ku salengac a ti'ku nu isi'an a imelang. nu inai'ay nu ti'ku nu isi'an a tademawan, idaw ku tahekalay nu talakaw a idangan atu nu dumaan a imelangay a tademaw, patahekal tu nabalucuan sakamusa tu ce-cen-cin-cen a nipiadih.
S.PHON: == sakatar~…ĺawan nu mapujapujaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ***** == sakatar~…ĺawan nu mapujapujan a mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, sniŇčaaŇčana ¶a tu ¶in- ¶aw- ¶…ô- ¶in, nu ¶wawaw,ju sumamad paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu sakatar~…ĺawan nu mapujpujaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u nikapujapujan ńß…ônaj a nikaidawan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u wajwaj nida ńßan u tar~…ĺakaw nu idaŇč atu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj nu ti Ē~ °ku a isi Ē~ °. mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßina i sakatur~…ĺu nu bur~…ĺadan a mapujapuj " sakapitu katukuńß i sakasiwa a bur~…ĺad", pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu i kapir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, anupińßa ¶…ôŇč kina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ar~…ĺaw a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku zun-sia a kawaw, s…ôa-saw-pan tadaadidi Ē~ °tu, ataj atu buwa Ē~ ° ar~…ĺaw a maduka mar~…ĺ…ôbawa, ¶umuda nu nanum ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu mir~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu mata. mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč patar~…ĺakaw tu mar~…ĺawinaaj a nikudan nu sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan. anu ¶aaj pikar~…ĺamkam a tajda i pad…ôkuwan paisiŇč, ar~…ĺaw a mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß, u ¶…ô- ¶…ôn. mar~…ĺ…ôbawa " mi ¶id…ôk ku bińßid atu r~…ĺima" u sakatin…ôŇčan nu misajdan tu misabir~…ĺiaj a wajwajan, nika u mapujapujan ńßina r~…ĺ…ôbawaw a wajwajan. sisa utiińß a adińßan, saan, r~…ĺ…ôbawa " mi ¶id…ôkaj nu r~…ĺ…ôbawawan, ńßina adińß kita tu bińßid,r~…ĺima, kuku Ē~ °, p…ôn…ô ¶ ńßan idaw ku nar~…ĺimaan" kija idaw ku niadińßan tu misajdan a imian,anu simańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kan ¶a a musakamu tu misajdan. ** *** nu mańßiniaj a misabir~…ĺiaj inai Ē~ ° ku pi ¶id…ôkan nu tar~…ĺakaw a wajwajan, kanańßatu mapujapujaj ńß…ônaj tańß…ôkar~…ĺ kina ńßa ¶ńßa ¶ nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj kańßida u misabir~…ĺiaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. adada ku i pabawaj nu bir~…ĺian a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč par~…ĺaadadaan nu bituka sa. sisa, paisiŇč kan ¶a a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku jadańßaj nu misabir~…ĺiaj nu ¶an ¶anan a wajwajan, namur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß satu mańßiniaj a wajwajan a mar~…ĺawp…ôstu tan…ôŇč kita par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. mańßiniaj nu ¶…ô-kun a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, inai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan tina im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, wida sa katin…ôŇčan atu jadańß nu wajwajan, pasumańßiniaj a kawaw, ¶aaj ka kapańß ku pisabir~…ĺian nu r~…ĺutuŇčaj i r~…ĺabu. ** *** ****. m…ôn-ji-s…ôa a kawaw***** mapujapuj tu aajaw nu im…ôr~…ĺan atu ajda a siim…ôr~…ĺaŇč, anu nasitar~…ĺakaw nu idaŇčan, kid…ômu, kan-r~…ĺin- ¶…ô im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, ńßatu nasikamir~…ĺmir~…ĺan nu misabir~…ĺi ńß…ônaj, sakatar~…ĺawan ku mańßiniaj. ** *** ,mi ¶id…ôk ku sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan **** sipakajda i kan, patinaku anu ¶aaj ka tan…ôŇč ku nika tu kaj- ¶…ô a mi ¶unus mukan tu kaj- ¶…ô, kja mawada tasasa ku ¶…ô- ¶in- ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn a katar~…ĺawan. . sipakajda i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik, u mauniŇč ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. . nu mat…ôn…ôsaj tu nasitar~…ĺakawaj nu idaŇč a mapujapuj, ¶…ô- ¶in- ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn a r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ¶aaj pikak…ô tu tar~…ĺakaw nu idaŇčan a pitu war~…ĺu a bajan. itini nikaudipan a nikinkiwan, maadińß ku ¶…ô- ¶in- ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn atu nikasumadan nika udipan idaw ku kanki: nu kar~…ĺawinaan atu nabinadu Ē~ °an idaw ku m…ôn-ji-iŇč-ta atu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺib…ôdan a nikasasumadan, maduka ku binaduan, atu ir~…ĺabuaj nu baŇč…ôs a si-paw maduka, masumad ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu ńßikan, j…ôn-ńßua-iŇč-r~…ĺi, ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇč ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ir~…ĺabuaj nu ńßikan a idaŇč mawada Ē~ °, atu mabur~…ĺasakaj a idaŇč i ńßikan masud nu idaŇč. anu mapujapuj idaw ku mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, anuidaw ku ¶…ô- ¶in- ¶in- ¶…ôn: na kapańß ńß…ônaj ku idaŇč, nika mapujapuj tu tusa a bataan a pir~…ĺipajan, sir~…ĺaad tu s…ôpat katukuńß tu …ôn…ôm a tatukian kinatusa midit…ôk tu idaŇč, anu tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku suo-su-ja **** mmńßg, atu su- ¶…ôn-ja *** mmńßg a idaŇčan. anu nikapujapujan tu tusa a aajaw nu pir~…ĺipajan na idaw t uku tar~…ĺakaw nu idŇč, u sakar~…ĺu ¶…ôk nu niadińßan: u suo-su-ja (sbp) tar~…ĺakaw a mir~…ĺakuujd tu ** mmńßg, atu su- ¶…ôn-ja (dbp) tar~…ĺakaw mir~…ĺakuujd tu **mmńßg. itini i tusip nu tukian a isi Ē~ °an, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu ti Ē~ °ku a isi Ē~ ° * *.* k…ô Ē~ ° "*** ńßaw k…ô Ē~ °" ńßatu spot sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu ti Ē~ °ku a isi Ē~ ° atu ¶i-kan nidit…ôkan **.*, atu niasipan tu tatip…ôr~…ĺukan u *+ ńßatu mikitar~…ĺakaw. anu mapujapuj ńß…ônaj tar~…ĺakaw ku idaŇč, kanańßatu inai Ē~ ° ku sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu ti Ē~ °ku a isi Ē~ °, apabar~…ĺiw kita tu nikaidawan nu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn- ¶in- ¶…ôn, amatur~…ĺin ku nipimir~…ĺaw. idaw ku ¶ajs…ôp % nu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn- ¶in- ¶…ôn a tad…ômaw idaw ku duma a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nu wajwajan, idaw ku tus…ôp % nu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn- ¶in- ¶…ôn a tad…ômaw inai Ē~ ° ku sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ a ti Ē~ °ku nu isi Ē~ °an a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. nu inai Ē~ °aj nu ti Ē~ °ku nu isi Ē~ °an a tad…ômawan, idaw ku tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu tar~…ĺakaw a idaŇčan atu nu dumaan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan sakamusa tu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn- ¶in- ¶…ôn a nipiadińß.
S.FORM: == sakatalawan nu mapuyapuyay a imelang Ś¶äŚ®†śĮíŤ°ÄÁóá == sakatalawan nu mapuyapuyan a mabulilah nu imelang, sningaanganaca tu cin-caw-ce-cin, nu cwawaw,yu sumamad pangangan han tu sakatalawan nu mapuypuyay a imelang, u nikapuyapuyan henay a nikaidawan nu imelang, u wayway nida han u talakaw nu idang atu salengacay nu ti'ku a isi'. mahiniaay a imelang hina i sakatulu nu buladan a mapuyapuy " sakapitu katukuh i sakasiwa a bulad", pihaceng tu i kapilecuhan, anupihaceng kina imelang alaw a tahekal ku zun-sia a kawaw, sea-saw-pan tadaadidi'tu, atay atu buwa' alaw a maduka malebawa, cumuda nu nanum ku bala' atu mila'cus tu mata. mahiniaay a imelang patalakaw tu malawinaay a nikudan nu sakabalihenawan. anu caay pikalamkam a tayda i padekuwan paising, alaw a mabulilah, u ce-cen. malebawa " micidek ku bihid atu lima" u sakatinengan nu misaydan tu misabiliay a waywayan, nika u mapuyapuyan hina lebawaw a waywayan. sisa utiih a adihan, saan, lebawa " micidekay nu lebawawan, hina adih kita tu bihid,lima, kuku', penec han idaw ku nalimaan" kiya idaw ku niadihan tu misaydan a imian,anu simahiniaay a imelang kanca a musakamu tu misaydan. 59 173 nu mahiniay a misabiliay inai' ku picidekan nu talakaw a waywayan, kanahatu mapuyapuyay henay tahekal kina hachac nu imelang caay kahida u misabiliay a imelangan. adada ku i pabaway nu bilian a imelang palaadadaan nu bituka sa. sisa, paising kanca a tahekal ku yadahay nu misabiliay nu cancanan a waywayan, namulecuh satu mahiniay a waywayan a malawpestu taneng kita palutatengan tu mahiniaay a imelangan. mahiniay nu ce-kun a imelangan, inai' henay ku wantan tina imelangan, wida sa katinengan atu yadah nu waywayan, pasumahiniay a kawaw, caay ka kapah ku pisabilian nu lutungay i labu. 30 267 ŤÉéŚļßÁēįŚłł. men-yi-sea a kawawŚÖćÁĖęŚ≠łŚõ†Áī† mapuyapuy tu aayaw nu imelan atu ayda a siimelang, anu nasitalakaw nu idangan, kidemu, kan-lin-ce imelangan, hatu nasikamilmilan nu misabili henay, sakatalawan ku mahiniay. 24 291 ,micidek ku sakabalihenawan ťĘ®ťö™ŤľÉťęė sipakayda i kan, patinaku anu caay ka taneng ku nika tu kay-ce a micunus mukan tu kay-ce, kya mawada tasasa ku ce-cin-cen-cen a katalawan. . sipakayda i liklik, u mauning ku hekal. . nu matenesay tu nasitalakaway nu idang a mapuyapuy, ce-cin-cen-cen a lemed caay pikake tu talakaw nu idangan a pitu walu a bayan. itini nikaudipan a nikinkiwan, maadih ku ce-cin-cen-cen atu nikasumadan nika udipan idaw ku kanki: nu kalawinaan atu nabinadu'an idaw ku men-yi-ing-ta atu nikalalibedan a nikasasumadan, maduka ku binaduan, atu ilabuay nu banges a si-paw maduka, masumad ku culil nu hikan, yen-hua-ing-li, culil nu idang caay ka lecad, ilabuay nu hikan a idang mawada', atu mabulasakay a idang i hikan masud nu idang. anu mapuyapuy idaw ku mahiniaay a imelang, anuidaw ku ce-cin-cin-cen: na kapah henay ku idang, nika mapuyapuy tu tusa a bataan a pilipayan, silaad tu sepat katukuh tu enem a tatukian kinatusa miditek tu idang, anu tahekal ku suo-su-ya ‚Č•140 mmHg, atu su-cen-ya ‚Č•90 mmHg a idangan. anu nikapuyapuyan tu tusa a aayaw nu pilipayan na idaw t uku talakaw nu idng, u sakalucek nu niadihan: u suo-su-ya (SBP) talakaw a milakuuyd tu 30 mmHg, atu su-cen-ya (DBP) talakaw milakuuyd tu 15mmHg. itini i tusip nu tukian a isi'an, salengac nu ti'ku a isi' ‚Č• 0.3 ke' "300 haw ke'" hatu SPOT salengac nu ti'ku a isi' atu ci-kan niditekan ‚Č•0.3, atu niasipan tu tatipelukan u 1+ hatu mikitalakaw. anu mapuyapuy henay talakaw ku idang, kanahatu inai' ku salengac nu ti'ku a isi', apabaliw kita tu nikaidawan nu ce-cen-cin-cen, amatulin ku nipimilaw. idaw ku caysep % nu ce-cen-cin-cen a tademaw idaw ku duma a imelangan nu waywayan, idaw ku tusep % nu ce-cen-cin-cen a tademaw inai' ku salengac a ti'ku nu isi'an a imelang. nu inai'ay nu ti'ku nu isi'an a tademawan, idaw ku tahekalay nu talakaw a idangan atu nu dumaan a imelangay a tademaw, patahekal tu nabalucuan sakamusa tu ce-cen-cin-cen a nipiadih.

ńßan tu sakatar~…ĺawan nu mapujpujaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u nikapujapujan ńß…ônaj a nikaidawan nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, u wajwaj nida ńßan u tar~…ĺakaw nu idaŇč atu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj nu ti Ē~ °ku a isi Ē~ °. mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßina i sakatur~…ĺu nu bur~…ĺadan a mapujapuj " sakapitu katukuńß i sakasiwa a bur~…ĺad", pińßa ¶…ôŇč tu i kapir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, anupińßa ¶…ôŇč kina im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ar~…ĺaw a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku zun-sia a kawaw, s…ôa-saw-pan tadaadidi Ē~ °tu, ataj atu buwa Ē~ ° ar~…ĺaw a maduka mar~…ĺ…ôbawa, ¶umuda nu nanum ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu mir~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu mata. mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč patar~…ĺakaw tu mar~…ĺawinaaj a nikudan nu sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan. anu ¶aaj pikar~…ĺamkam a tajda i pad…ôkuwan paisiŇč, ar~…ĺaw a mabur~…ĺir~…ĺańß, u ¶…ô- ¶…ôn. mar~…ĺ…ôbawa " mi ¶id…ôk ku bińßid atu r~…ĺima" u sakatin…ôŇčan nu misajdan tu misabir~…ĺiaj a wajwajan, nika u mapujapujan ńßina r~…ĺ…ôbawaw a wajwajan. sisa utiińß a adińßan, saan, r~…ĺ…ôbawa " mi ¶id…ôkaj nu r~…ĺ…ôbawawan, ńßina adińß kita tu bińßid,r~…ĺima, kuku Ē~ °, p…ôn…ô ¶ ńßan idaw ku nar~…ĺimaan" kija idaw ku niadińßan tu misajdan a imian,anu simańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kan ¶a a musakamu tu misajdan. ** *** nu mańßiniaj a misabir~…ĺiaj inai Ē~ ° ku pi ¶id…ôkan nu tar~…ĺakaw a wajwajan, kanańßatu mapujapujaj ńß…ônaj tańß…ôkar~…ĺ kina ńßa ¶ńßa ¶ nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aaj kańßida u misabir~…ĺiaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. adada ku i pabawaj nu bir~…ĺian a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč par~…ĺaadadaan nu bituka sa. sisa, paisiŇč kan ¶a a tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku jadańßaj nu misabir~…ĺiaj nu ¶an ¶anan a wajwajan, namur~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß satu mańßiniaj a wajwajan a mar~…ĺawp…ôstu tan…ôŇč kita par~…ĺutat…ôŇčan tu mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan. mańßiniaj nu ¶…ô-kun a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, inai Ē~ ° ńß…ônaj ku wantan tina im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, wida sa katin…ôŇčan atu jadańß nu wajwajan, pasumańßiniaj a kawaw, ¶aaj ka kapańß ku pisabir~…ĺian nu r~…ĺutuŇčaj i r~…ĺabu. ** *** ****. m…ôn-ji-s…ôa a kawaw***** mapujapuj tu aajaw nu im…ôr~…ĺan atu ajda a siim…ôr~…ĺaŇč, anu nasitar~…ĺakaw nu idaŇčan, kid…ômu, kan-r~…ĺin- ¶…ô im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan, ńßatu nasikamir~…ĺmir~…ĺan nu misabir~…ĺi ńß…ônaj, sakatar~…ĺawan ku mańßiniaj. ** *** ,mi ¶id…ôk ku sakabar~…ĺińß…ônawan **** sipakajda i kan, patinaku anu ¶aaj ka tan…ôŇč ku nika tu kaj- ¶…ô a mi ¶unus mukan tu kaj- ¶…ô, kja mawada tasasa ku ¶…ô- ¶in- ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn a katar~…ĺawan. . sipakajda i r~…ĺikr~…ĺik, u mauniŇč ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. . nu mat…ôn…ôsaj tu nasitar~…ĺakawaj nu idaŇč a mapujapuj, ¶…ô- ¶in- ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn a r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ¶aaj pikak…ô tu tar~…ĺakaw nu idaŇčan a pitu war~…ĺu a bajan. itini nikaudipan a nikinkiwan, maadińß ku ¶…ô- ¶in- ¶…ôn- ¶…ôn atu nikasumadan nika udipan idaw ku kanki: nu kar~…ĺawinaan atu nabinadu Ē~ °an idaw ku m…ôn-ji-iŇč-ta atu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺib…ôdan a nikasasumadan, maduka ku binaduan, atu ir~…ĺabuaj nu baŇč…ôs a si-paw maduka, masumad ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu ńßikan, j…ôn-ńßua-iŇč-r~…ĺi, ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu idaŇč ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, ir~…ĺabuaj nu ńßikan a idaŇč mawada Ē~ °, atu mabur~…ĺasakaj a idaŇč i ńßikan masud nu idaŇč. anu mapujapuj idaw ku mańßiniaaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, anuidaw ku ¶…ô- ¶in- ¶in- ¶…ôn: na kapańß ńß…ônaj ku idaŇč, nika mapujapuj tu tusa a bataan a pir~…ĺipajan, sir~…ĺaad tu s…ôpat katukuńß tu …ôn…ôm a tatukian kinatusa midit…ôk tu idaŇč, anu tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku suo-su-ja **** mmńßg, atu su- ¶…ôn-ja *** mmńßg a idaŇčan. anu nikapujapujan tu tusa a aajaw nu pir~…ĺipajan na idaw t uku tar~…ĺakaw nu idŇč, u sakar~…ĺu ¶…ôk nu niadińßan: u suo-su-ja (sbp) tar~…ĺakaw a mir~…ĺakuujd tu ** mmńßg, atu su- ¶…ôn-ja (dbp) tar~…ĺakaw mir~…ĺakuujd tu **mmńßg. itini i tusip nu tukian a isi Ē~ °an, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu ti Ē~ °ku a isi Ē~ ° * *.* k…ô Ē~ ° "*** ńßaw k…ô Ē~ °" ńßatu spot sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu ti Ē~ °ku a isi Ē~ ° atu ¶i-kan nidit…ôkan **.*, atu niasipan tu tatip…ôr~…ĺukan u *+ ńßatu mikitar~…ĺakaw. anu mapujapuj ńß…ônaj tar~…ĺakaw ku idaŇč, kanańßatu inai Ē~ ° ku sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ nu ti Ē~ °ku a isi Ē~ °, apabar~…ĺiw kita tu nikaidawan nu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn- ¶in- ¶…ôn, amatur~…ĺin ku nipimir~…ĺaw. idaw ku ¶ajs…ôp % nu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn- ¶in- ¶…ôn a tad…ômaw idaw ku duma a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčan nu wajwajan, idaw ku tus…ôp % nu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn- ¶in- ¶…ôn a tad…ômaw inai Ē~ ° ku sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶ a ti Ē~ °ku nu isi Ē~ °an a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. nu inai Ē~ °aj nu ti Ē~ °ku nu isi Ē~ °an a tad…ômawan, idaw ku tańß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu tar~…ĺakaw a idaŇčan atu nu dumaan a im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj a tad…ômaw, patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan sakamusa tu ¶…ô- ¶…ôn- ¶in- ¶…ôn a nipiadińß.
